3209300.name: RETRO ROBOTS 2D
3209300.description:
Planet Earth is coming to an end and is also suffering an alien attack.
The Retro Robots will help us fight them in the search for a habitable planet. Live an epic adventure fighting and traveling through different planets and gravities (42 missions).


· Robots on Foot:
Choose your favorite Retro Robot and fight your enemies on foot. Jump, shoot, change weapons and robots, power ups, become a motorcycle or robot, fly with the Jet-Pack and have fun. Elevators and platforms.


· Jet-Pack:
If you take the Jet-Pack power up you can fly as long as it has fuel.


· Motorbike:
There are missions especially for motorcycles, especially fun, fast and frenetic. On planets with low gravity motorcycles fly, ha, ha, ha.


· Space Ship:
Combat missions against UFOs and alien fighters. Dodge the asteroids with red lines and push the ones with green lines. Rescue, search, mazes, balance and skill. Shoot and bomb.


· Moon Car:
Its power, speed and jump vary depending on the planet we are on and its gravity. Destroy the enemy bikes, complete the mission before the timer reaches zero, run. Its functionality is very very fun.


· Planets & Missions (42):
The Earth (Instrucction (7), war (7)), The Moon (1), Mothership Interior (1), Open Space (1), Mercury (2), Venus (1), Mars (2), Invaded City (3), Jupiter (3), Saturn (Rings (1), Surface (3)), Uranus (4) and Neptune (6). Until reaching the planet Green hope.


· Enemies:
Cannons, lasers, drones, robots, killer balls, harmful zones, UFOs, fighters, trucks, asteroids, aliens, traps, ... ...
3209300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
